title: turn_outcomes
description: Per-turn audit log for the recursive improvement loop. Written by the bot on every turn. The post_hoc_verdict field is filled by Arif (the human sovereign) only, never by the agent. This is the F1+F7+F13 anti-self-certification guardrail.

turn_id.description: Unique identifier for this turn. UUIDv4.

session_id.description: The opencode session ID where this turn happened.

organ.description: Which organ produced this turn. Bound to F1-F13 by the organ's prompt file.

task_id.description: The task this turn belongs to. Cross-references VAULT999.

prompt_hash.description: First 16 chars of SHA-256 of the prompt file used. Critical for the recursive loop: when this changes, the loop knows a prompt mutation was applied.

user_message.description: The original message that triggered this turn. May be redacted for PII (F12).

organ_response.description: The full response from the organ. May be redacted for PII (F12).

verdict.description: The verdict emitted by the organ. HERMES verdicts are binding for MED risk; HIGH risk verdicts are advisory only.

risk_class.description: The risk class the organ assigned. If uncertain, escalate upward.

floors_cited.description: Floors the organ explicitly cited. F1-F13.

token_cost_in.description: Input tokens consumed. Tracked for efficiency metrics.

token_cost_out.description: Output tokens produced. Tracked for efficiency metrics.

hold_reason.description: If verdict is HOLD, the reason. Empty if not HOLD.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the turn. UTC.

post_hoc_verdict.description: Filled by Arif (the human sovereign) only. NEVER by the agent. This is the Gödel Lock defense: same species cannot judge same species, but a human can judge an agent's output. null = not yet marked.

post_hoc_verdict_by.description: The actor_id who filled post_hoc_verdict. Should always be arif-fazil. If anything else appears, F1 AMANAH is violated.

post_hoc_verdict_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when post_hoc_verdict was filled.

notes.description: Optional notes from the human marker. Free-form. Should be terse.
